dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace confirms that the rules-context-loader executed successfully with explicit schema validation. This ensures that the foundational architectural rules were loaded and respected throughout the orchestration flow, maintaining a perfect compliance record for this stage.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-to-evolution-map successfully processed a high volume of context tokens (48,998) to generate a substantial output of 6,325 tokens. The ability to maintain schema validity across such a large reasoning span indicates deep logical consistency in identifying architectural evolution steps.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment-engine and intent-generator both reached completion status with zero failures. This indicates that the system successfully navigated trade-offs and mapped them to specific architectural intents, resolving potential tensions between business goals and technical constraints.
